## tscli list users

List tailnet users

```
tscli list users [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for users
      --role string   Filter by user role: owner|member|admin|it-admin|network-admin|billing-admin|auditor|all
      --type string   Filter by user type: member|shared|all
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
